$schema-comment: Pre-existing orphan BEM hooks tolerated by Story #834. The codifying Story is scoped to the EmptyState primitive plus the lint infrastructure; refactoring the listed files into Tailwind utilities is owned by follow-on Stories. New entries require a paired Story reference in the PR body. See docs/decisions/0007-ui-styling-convention.md for the binding rule and scripts/lint-orphan-bem.mjs for the resolver set.
